dependencies: Energy is the single largest cost item in the production and distribution of industrial gases
Raw materials for hydrogen, helium, carbon dioxide, carbon monoxide, and specialty gases are largely purchased from outside sources
Helium is sourced from certain helium-rich natural gas streams in the United States, with additional supplies being acquired from outside the United States
risks: Energy availability and price is unpredictable and may pose future risks
Long-term availability and prices of raw materials are subject to market conditions
A disruption in supply of raw materials could impact ability to meet contractual supply commitments

regulatory_risks: Environmental protection laws and regulations, including climate change and energy efficiency laws and policies
U.S. and non-U.S. tax laws and currency controls
Securities laws applicable in the United States, the European Union, and other jurisdictions
Trade and import/export restrictions, as well as economic sanctions laws
Global anti-bribery laws, including the U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act
EPA regulations requiring reporting of GHG emissions
EPA regulations to restrict GHG emissions from light-duty vehicles and certain large manufacturing facilities
Carbon taxation or trading systems in China, Singapore and the European Union
Cap-and-trade regulations in California and the European Union
Pillar II, the 15% global minimum tax rate provisions of the OECD's framework
Inflation Reduction Act in the U.S. providing investments in production of clean hydrogen and decarbonization technologies

sanction_risks: Economic sanctions on Russia due to Russian invasion of Ukraine
Multiple jurisdictions including Europe and the U.S. have imposed several tranches of economic sanctions on Russia
Compliance with sanctions and government restrictions on embargoed or sanctioned countries, governments, persons and entities
Performance of all Linde Engineering agreements in Russia were lawfully suspended in compliance with applicable sanctions
Deconsolidation of Russian gas and engineering business entities as of June 30, 2022
